description: Core access for the main window. File I/O runs through the fs/dialog plugins' JS bindings directly (`window.__TAURI__.fs`/`.dialog`), not custom Rust commands. Desktop is unsandboxed — `fs:scope` is intentionally unrestricted (`**`) to allow reading/writing any user-picked path, matching normal desktop app trust. `confy-picker:default` is Android's write-capable file picker (Task 0 finding — `tauri-plugin-dialog`'s Android picker never grants write access); unused on desktop.
